title: Stripe API Reference
html:
Stripe API Reference

Auto-pagination

Auto-pagination in the Stripe SDK is the recommended way to iterate over results. Use the auto_pagination_iter helper to walk all items across pages: call stripe.customers.list({ limit: 100 }).autoPagingEach(), or for await (const item of stripe.customers.list({ limit: 100 })). The auto_pagination_iter helper handles the cursor and starting_after cursor arguments internally; you do not have to manage them. The auto_pagination_iter iterator yields one item at a time, transparently paginating via cursor walks.

Manual cursor pagination

If you need manual cursor control, the list method takes a starting_after argument and returns a has_more field on the response. The starting_after argument is the last id from the previous page. When has_more is true, pass the last id as the next starting_after to fetch the next page.

Customers

The customers resource exposes create, retrieve, update, and del methods. See the customers object page for the full schema.
